en_title: Spider Tangled in Its Own Silk
en_body:
night slowly encroaches
soul drooping
between Love, between Duty
Existence tangled into turmoil...
your happiness
is also mine
yet secretly I grieve
for this private love
alone...
parallel paths
yours/mine
between two points
crookedly entangled!
a love nurtures
dreams
pity me, solitary
night/day this single body:
still knowing
your words of blessing
why
must the heart choke forever
upon this frail thread
of its own!
the road of life
leans its shadow
I go:
my heart filled over
with private love given
to you...
note: The title braids the spider's tangled silk with the idiom “tơ vò,” an inward torment of love knotted upon itself.
